Zimbabwe T20I Tri-Series Squad: Newman Nyamhuri Included

Zimbabwe T20I Tri-Series Squad: Newman Nyamhuri Included

Zimbabwe have named their squad for the upcoming T20I tri-series, with young talent Newman Nyamhuri making headlines after receiving his first major international call-up. The selectors emphasized youth development as the driving force behind this squad.
